message:
feat(doctor): add real filesystem state probes to doctor checks

Add three new doctor checks that probe actual filesystem state:
- DR-STORAGE-012: Verify fleet state directory exists and is writable
- DR-SECURITY-013: Verify receipt signing key file exists if configured
- DR-ENGINE-014: Verify engine binary exists and is executable

All checks properly pass/warn/fail based on real filesystem state rather
than just config values. Includes comprehensive test coverage for
success, warning, and failure cases.

Closes bd-1xz63, bd-2fqyv.3.2, bd-2566h

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
